message:
chore(gitignore): ignore top-level .beads_snapshot_* directories

Adds `.beads_snapshot_*/` to the existing beads ephemeral-artifact
section. These are timestamped snapshots of the entire `.beads/`
directory taken by `br doctor` and similar tooling before any
destructive repair; they contain the old `beads.db`, `-wal` file,
and a copy of the br history tree.

Sibling patterns `.beads/*.bad_*`, `.beads/*.backup_*`, and
`.beads/recovery*/` are already present; this adds the missing
root-level snapshot-dir variant.

files.patch:
@@ -126,6 +126,7 @@ gemini.mcp.json
 .beads/*.reindex_test_*
 .beads/*.vacuum_test_*
 .beads/recovery*/
+.beads_snapshot_*/
 
 # Fuzz artifacts (campaign outputs, crash artifacts, build products)
 fuzz-*.log
